transcript: Speaker A: Salary 12,000... aani kharcha 11,990... urlele paise itke kami ki swatahsathi kahich karu shakat nahi. Hi goshta aahe Rahul chi, Nashik cha mulga, vay 24. Data entry chi job, salary 12,000. Rozcha routine: office, ghar, reels, zop. Swapna hoti, pan English yet navhta. Ekda MNC interview mila. Interviewer mhanala, 'Tell me about yourself.' Rahul completely blank. 30 second silence. Mag kasabasa mhanala, 'Sir, mi Rahul aahe, mi kaam karto.' Interviewer hasla, 'Thank you.' Call kadhich ala nahi. Tya ratri reels scroll karat hota, tevdhyat MySivi app disla. Trial - fakt 1 rupaya. Vichar kela, 1 rupayat kay janar? Pahilyach divshi basic shikla, 'How to introduce yourself.' Sagla itka sopa vatla ki vatla, he mi pan karu shakto. Tya divsa pasun reels aivaji roz 15 minute MySivi var practice. AI teacher sobat bolayla lagla. Chuka kelya, lagech correct. 100 vela chukla, 100 vela sudharla. Kadhi judge nahi kela. Ek mahina gela, punha interview dila. 'Tell me about yourself.' 'Good morning sir, my name is Rahul. I have experience in data entry...' Confidence full, select! Salary 28,000. Kay badalla? Fakt rozche 15 minute, je adhi reels madhye waste hot hote. Jar tumhalahi English madhye better vhaycha asel tar, aajach MySivi app download kara aani fakt 1 rupaya madhye practice suru kara. [Speaker A: Salary 12,000... and expenses 11,990... remaining money is so little that he can't do anything for himself. This is the story of Rahul, a 24-year-old boy from Nashik. Data entry job, salary 12,000. Daily routine: office, home, reels, sleep. He had dreams, but didn't know English. Once he got an MNC interview. The interviewer said, 'Tell me about yourself.' Rahul went completely blank. 30 seconds of silence. Then he somehow said, 'Sir, I am Rahul, I work.' The interviewer laughed, 'Thank you.' The call never came. That night he was scrolling reels, just then he saw the MySivi app. Trial - only 1 rupee. He thought, what is there to lose in 1 rupee? On the very first day he learnt the basics, 'How to introduce yourself.' Everything felt so easy that he thought, I can do this too. From that day, instead of reels, 15 minutes of daily practice on MySivi. He started speaking with the AI teacher. Made mistakes, corrected immediately. Erred 100 times, corrected 100 times. Never judged. One month passed, gave the interview again. 'Tell me about yourself.' 'Good morning sir, my name is Rahul. I have experience in data entry...' Full confidence, selected! Salary 28,000. What changed? Just 15 minutes daily, which were earlier wasted on reels. If you also want to get better at English, download the MySivi app today and start practicing for just 1 rupee.]

[if so...], आजच MySivi [Today itself MySivi], app download, करा आणि [do and], फक्त 1 रुपया [only 1 rupee], मध्ये [in], practice सुरू [practice start], करा [do]
summary: The ad tells the story of Rahul, a data entry operator earning 12,000 rupees who gets rejected in an MNC interview due to poor English. He discovers the MySivi app, practices for 15 minutes daily with the AI teacher for just 1 rupee, and successfully clears his next interview to secure a 28,000 rupee salary. Viewers are urged to download MySivi and start practicing for 1 rupee.
